Questions

Pricing FAQ

Can I change plans anytime?

Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

What counts as a conversation?

A conversation is a single session with Ferni, regardless of length. You can talk as long as you want in one session.

Is there a free trial?

Yes, both Friend and Partner tiers include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

How does billing work?

We bill monthly. You can cancel anytime, and you'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

Built on trust.

Your conversations are yours. Always. We use enterprise-grade encryption and never sell your data.

Read our Privacy Policy
